name: Appliancer Socketroll
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>電</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>でん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>幻</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>機</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>塊</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>コンセントロール
desc: If you control an "Appliancer" monster: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If another "Appliancer Socketroll" is Special Summoned to your field while you control this monster (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon 1 "Appliancer Socketroll" from your Deck. You can only use each effect of "Appliancer Socketroll" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If you control an "Appliancer" monster: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If another "Appliancer Socketroll" is Special Summoned to your field while you control this monster (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon 1 "Appliancer Socketroll" from your Deck. You can only use each effect of "Appliancer Socketroll" once per turn.

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
